title: Idle/inactive users
excerpt: How can I get a list of users in my instance that are inactive? I want to clean up my account, but to do so I need to know the last time they logged in or interacted with a board or item. I suspect I have many users who …

posts.author: grt-s (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I get a list of users in my instance that are inactive? I want to clean up my account, but to do so I need to know the last time they logged in or interacted with a board or item. I suspect I have many users who have logged in once and then never done anything else.

The admin panel lists the join date but provides no other telemetry that I could see to indicate how engaged a user is after that point.

Help?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @grt-s - you can reach out to support@monday.com to help you with this need.
